title: gbrain #394: dream JSON dry runs must not mix human stdout
summary: When gbrain dream runs the embed phase with json, call runEmbedCore with quiet:true so stdout remains one JSON document even for dry run stale chunks. Keep standalone gbrain embed human summaries unchanged. Regression: t
body:
When gbrain dream runs the embed phase with --json, call runEmbedCore with quiet:true so stdout remains one JSON document even for dry-run stale chunks. Keep standalone gbrain embed human summaries unchanged. Regression: test/dream.test.ts seeds a stale chunk and asserts dream --phase embed --dry-run --json starts with JSON and parses.
Evidence: Fixed in PR #827 for issue #394; tests: test/dream.test.ts, typecheck, git diff --check. E2E dream suite skips without DATABASE_URL.
Verified by: bun test test/dream.test.ts; bun run typecheck; git diff --check
